purpose: Record that the normal assistant web fetch path could not verify a JRA one-meeting race-time result, and define the Codex/local browser DevTools task required before any JRA snapshot. This file is not a calendar input and does not promote JRA.

normal_fetch_result.observed_issue: JRA pages were not reliably parseable through assistant web fetch; several official URLs returned Unicode decoding errors or could not be safely opened from the current search context.
normal_fetch_result.reason_not_verified: No source-verified JRA race_number/race_time rows were obtained through normal assistant web fetch.

required_codex_or_devtools_task.task_title: Inspect one official JRA meeting for race_number and race_time rows
required_codex_or_devtools_task.goal: Find whether one official JRA meeting page or route exposes every race_number and race_time from official JRA resources.

expected_result_schema.source_route_type: calendar_page | racecard_page | jradb_route | network_payload | mixed | not_found

meeting.racecourse: official JRA racecourse name or null
meeting.meeting_id_or_code: official code if found, otherwise null

promotion_decision.next_required_step: Run the Codex/local browser DevTools task and commit its result before any JRA snapshot.

forward_schedule.topic: JRA Codex or DevTools one-meeting result
forward_schedule.goal: Record user-provided or tool-provided browser inspection result for one JRA meeting.
If PR-152 succeeds, create a one-meeting snapshot from verified rows.
If PR-152 fails, pause JRA and move to NAR inventory.
If PR-152 succeeds, test wider coverage before promotion.

forward_schedule.topic: JRA wider snapshot or no-promotion status
forward_schedule.goal: Create wider data only if source coverage is complete.
Promote JRA only if PR-132 rank rules are satisfied.
